name: @ninthwave-io/unused
description: unused — liveness oracle for software. Tells engineering teams what code is truly unused, with graded confidence and provenance.
//build: dist/ is plain per-file tsc output (ADR 0008 defers the single-file bundle decision to M9) — bin points at the compiled cli entry, not a bundle.
//exports: '.' is the programmatic surface (src/index.ts) — see its docstring: unstable pre-1.0, unlike the CLI's --json/SARIF/exit-code contracts.
//files: Test/testing-harness output is excluded from dist via negated globs (T9.1) — see packaging.test.ts, which asserts the packed tarball is test-free. schemas/ is generated by `build` (scripts/copy-schemas.mjs), not checked in.

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm -w run build && pnpm -w run ci
